description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a light gray woven fabric upholstery and a wooden base. The sofa features three large seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be loose rather than attached. Four accent pillows in dark gray and taupe are arranged on the seating area, adding contrast and comfort. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of equal height to the backrest, providing a clean, contemporary silhouette. The legs are short, square, and made of wood, slightly elevating the sofa above the ground. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray woven fabric with a wooden base, boxy armrests, and four accent pillows. The design is minimalist and contemporary, featuring uniform seat and back cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, and four accent pillows arranged across the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise section and the straight, boxy armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the length of the main seating section and the arrangement of accent pillows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all loose and evenly spaced; four accent pillows in two colors are placed at the corners and center.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at both ends, equal in height to the backrest, with a minimalist, unadorned profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, square wooden legs positioned at the corners and under the chaise, exposed and slightly recessed, with a simple, sturdy appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at a medium height, segmented into three sections by the back cushions, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light gray woven fabric with a subtle, uniform texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
